assertions.assertion: Uses AddAspNetIdentityMigration() with a connection string pointing to the existing ASP.NET Identity database
assertions.rationale: No mention of AddAspNetIdentityMigration(); suggests writing a custom migration script.

assertions.assertion: States that existing password hashes are preserved (users can log in with current passwords)
assertions.rationale: Mentions 'ASP.NET Identity uses PBKDF2... If your new system supports the same hashing format, users won't need to reset passwords'.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that migration is idempotent (subsequent runs skip already-imported users)
assertions.rationale: Mentions making migration idempotent as a suggestion but doesn't state this is built-in behavior.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that after migration users can enroll in passwordless methods
assertions.rationale: Vaguely mentions 'set up new authentication flow for modern methods like passkeys' but not in the context of Duende User Management enrollment.
